get.summary: Get all listings in an account
get.description: This API call will return all the listings in a customer's account across all PMSs, with their minimum price, base price, recommended base price and maximum price along with other Performance Metrics available on the Pricing Dashboard and Multi-Calendar pages.

Returns numerical KPI data for a single listing, including listing-level metrics and market-level comparison data. Metrics include occupancy, revenue, ADR, RevPAR, adjusted occupancy, base price ratio, min prices, and last booked date. Response has listing_level and market_level keys. Requires listing_id and pms_name query params plus X-API-Key header.

get.summary: Get neighborhood data for a listing
get.description: Get neighborhood data for your listing with all stats shown on the Neighborhood Tab. Requires listing_id and pms query params plus X-API-Key header. Returns Future Percentile Prices, Future Occ/New/Canc, Summary Table Base Price, and Market KPI, each broken down by bedroom category or custom compset. Neighborhood Data Source can be 'Nearby Listings' or 'Market Dashboard: <name>'.

post.summary: Get bookings report with filters and pagination
Generate report data (async, requires polling via /report_builder/poll)

note: Full spec available in PriceLabs developer docs at developers.pricelabs.co/customer-api. This trimmed version highlights the endpoints relevant to Upside Tool A (listing_metrics, neighborhood_data). Confirmed: both require listing_id + pms as query params, meaning they only work for listings already connected to the PriceLabs account -- not usable for Tool B prospect properties.
